solution:
def isLongPressedName(self, name: str, typed: str) -> bool:
    name_set = set(name.lower())
    typed_set = set(typed.lower())
    return len(typed_set - name_set) <= 1

efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(name_set + typed_set)
space complexity: O(name_set + typed_set)
energy implications: LOW

Explanation:
We create two sets, one for the name and one for the typed characters. Then, we check if the number of differences between the two sets is equal to or less than 1. This solution has a moderate efficiency because it requires creating two sets, which has a time complexity of O(name_set + typed_set). The space complexity is also moderate, as we create two sets, which takes up additional memory. The energy implications are low, as the solution does not involve any resource-intensive operations.
